response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken dialogue matches the live introductory context; no vocal music is present in this segment of the video (it is an instrumental BGM version of the song), so lyric transcription was not needed. 2. JSON Usage: Spoken dialogue was transcribed and translated manually based on the audio waveform. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to synchronize with the fast-paced spoken announcements by Houshou Marine and Usada Pekora.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
最後までライブを楽しんでいただくために、いくつかご案内をさせていただきます！
subtitles.english: To make sure everyone enjoys the concert to the end, we have a few announcements!

subtitles.original: 公演中の撮影、録音、録画機材の使用は固くお断りいたします。
subtitles.english: Photography, recording, and filming during the performance are strictly prohibited.

subtitles.original: 館内は禁煙となっております。喫煙はご遠慮ください。
subtitles.english: The venue is non-smoking. Please refrain from smoking.

subtitles.original: 万が一具合が悪くなってしまった場合は、無理をせず、近くのスタッフへお知らせください。
subtitles.english: If you feel unwell, please do not push yourself and inform a nearby staff member.

subtitles.original: 会場内でのモッシュ、ダイブ、ステージに物を投げ込むなど、他の皆の迷惑になったり公演を妨げる行為は一切禁止です！
subtitles.english: Moshing, diving, and throwing objects onto the stage, or any other acts that disrupt the show or trouble others, are strictly prohibited!

subtitles.original: ルールを守って盛り上がってくださいね！
subtitles.english: Please follow the rules and have a great time!

subtitles.original: また、本公演は映像配信および写真撮影用のカメラが会場内に入り、客席が映り込む場合があります。
subtitles.english: Also, cameras for video streaming and photography are in the venue, so the audience seats may be captured.

subtitles.original: これらの映像や写真はプロモーション等に使用される可能性が...可能性が、ありますので...うわああっ！あらかじめご了承ください！
subtitles.english: These videos and photos may be used for promotions... there is a possibility, so... Whoa! Please understand in advance!

subtitles.original: また、ライブのハッシュタグは、#きゅるるん大作戦Day1 です！
ハッシュタグを使って、たくさん盛り上げてくれると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: We'd be happy if you used the hashtag to post and build up the excitement!

subtitles.original: それでは、開演までもう少しです。
subtitles.english: Well then, there is only a little time left before the show starts.

subtitles.original: みんなの声を、たくさん聞かせてぺこ！
subtitles.english: Let us hear a lot of your voices, peko!

subtitles.original: それじゃあ3期生、円陣行くかー！
subtitles.english: Alright, 3rd Gen, let's do our huddle!

subtitles.original: みんな今からマイクが無くなるので、静かに、静かに...
subtitles.english: Everyone, our mics will be turned off now, so be quiet, be quiet...
